description_long: This rustic bar features a weathered wooden structure with a prominent front counter, complete with barrels, stools, and various small objects scattered across the bar top. The upper level is bordered by a simple wooden railing, while the back wall is constructed from rough stone, giving the building a sturdy, old-world appearance. A large, natural wooden post supports the roof and adds to the organic, hand-built feel of the establishment. Lantern-style lighting fixtures are mounted on the exterior, providing a warm, inviting glow. The entrance is open and accessible from the front, with a wooden deck extending outward, flanked by stools and a bucket. The overall design suggests a cozy, medieval or fantasy-inspired tavern, likely frequented by locals and travelers alike.
description: A rustic, wooden bar with a stone back wall, open front counter, and lantern lighting, evoking a medieval tavern atmosphere. The structure features a wooden deck, stools, and a prominent upper railing.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open bar counter, stools, barrels, lantern, and wooden deck with railing above.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the large wooden post, lantern, and partial view of the bar's interior and deck.
description_view_2: Rear view dominated by a rough stone wall and the upper wooden railing, with minimal visible entry points.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the deck, stools, lantern, and the open structure of the bar's side.
attribute_entrance_type: Open front with wooden deck, no visible door, accessible by stepping onto the deck.
attribute_outdoor_seating: Stools present on the wooden deck in front of the bar counter.
attribute_architectural_style: Rustic, medieval tavern with hand-built wooden and stone elements.
